title: Shut Your Eyes
description: Do you wanna play a game?
body:
![Shut Your Eyes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d77800ccda42220314e3e981b413cc79a7a6358.png)
![Epilepsy Warning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eaaba9035c8e306a2a1994643fd81f350c8f2ba.png)

*REQUIRES GECKOLIB*

This entity will stalk you throughout your Minecraft world.

It will attack when you are most vulnerable.

Shut Your Eyes to prevent him from killing you. Only Open Them When The Sound Cue Indicates That He Is Gone.

Shut Your Eyes Key Is Set To "G" As The Default.

Hold Your Breath Key Is Set To "ENTER" As The Default.

This mod is early access, so there most likely will me several bugs.

A huge thanks to Puffsgaming81 for helping out a lot with the new model!



The configuration file has all things you need to modify events. This includes: Disabling killing all entities, Changing spawn rates, and Event timers.

(In order to access the config, you need to go to saves, go to the world you want to change settings for, and go to serverconfig)

Type in the command "repair_sye" to repair your world for Shut Your Eyes. This could help fix som issues.

![Wanna Play A Game?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da11d504710e5ee5fda8c5539798117e7bdda5c9.png)

**Encounters**:
